basic_info.title: Dispatch
basic_info.review: Dispatch is a superhero workplace comedy that successfully captures the spirit of Telltale Games while adding its own unique twist with strategic dispatching mechanics. The stellar voice cast including Aaron Paul and Laura Bailey delivers memorable performances in this emotionally resonant story about redemption and second chances.

play_today.details: The definitive version with full uncensored content, highest performance, Steam Deck verified compatibility, and extensive mod support. Features the complete experience as intended by developers.

recommended_patches.name: 60 FPS Cap Fix
recommended_patches.description: Fixes the 62 FPS judder issue by enabling Vsync and capping framerate to 60 FPS via RTSS or driver settings.

recommended_patches.name: No UI Mod
recommended_patches.description: Removes dialogue choice UI, timer, and notifications for a clean cinematic experience (requires UE4SS).

recommended_patches.name: Dialogue Variable Tracker
recommended_patches.description: Shows which dialogue options affect hidden variables and endings. Essential for understanding choice consequences.

recommended_patches.name: Spanish Latin America Translation
recommended_patches.description: Fan translation removing Spanish Spain idioms in favor of more universal Latin American Spanish.

play_today.details: Excellent console experience with full uncensored content. Optimized performance and controller support via DualSense haptic feedback.

recommended_patches.name: Update 1.0.16838
recommended_patches.description: Latest patch fixing English text appearing in other language subtitles and various softlock issues.

play_today.details: Enhanced port at 1440p resolution and 60FPS, but contains censorship issues that were partially addressed in February 2026 update. Invisigal's dream sequence was uncensored but other content remains censored.

recommended_patches.name: February 2026 Update
recommended_patches.description: Update that uncensors Invisigal's dream sequence. Note: Not all censored content has been restored.

play_today.details: Original Switch port at 720p resolution and 30FPS with significant censorship issues. Black boxes cover nudity, sexual content, and crude gestures that cannot be disabled. Community patches exist for modded consoles but are unofficial.

recommended_patches.name: Uncensored Community Patch
recommended_patches.description: Community-created patch that removes censorship. Only works with original game version before updates. Requires modded console.

description.synopsis: Former superhero Mecha Man Robert Robertson III must take a job as dispatcher at the Superhero Dispatch Network after his mech suit is destroyed. Managing a team of rehabilitated supervillains, he navigates office politics while rebuilding his suit and seeking revenge against the villain who killed his father.
key_features: Episodic narrative with 8 episodes released weekly
Star-studded voice cast including Aaron Paul, Laura Bailey, Jeffrey Wright, and content creators
Strategic dispatching gameplay on SDN map
Multiple endings based on player choices
Hacking mini-games with quick time events
Mature content including nudity and strong language
description.long_description:
Dispatch is a 2025 episodic adventure game developed by AdHoc Studio, formed by veterans from Telltale Games. The game follows Robert Robertson III (Aaron Paul), formerly the superhero Mecha Man, who must work as a dispatcher at the Superhero Dispatch Network after his mech suit is destroyed in battle against his father's killer, Shroud. Players manage a team of rehabilitated supervillains known as the Z-Team while navigating office politics, personal relationships, and their own quest for revenge.

The game features an all-star voice cast including Aaron Paul, Laura Bailey, Erin Yvette, Jeffrey Wright, Travis Willingham, Matthew Mercer, MoistCr1TiKaL (Charles White), jacksepticeye (Seán McLoughlin), Alanah Pearce, Joel Haver, and Yung Gravy. The narrative explores themes of redemption, second chances, and what it means to be a hero.

Dispatch received critical acclaim with Metacritic scores of 87 for PC, 89 for PS5, and 85 for Switch 2. OpenCritic reported 97% of critics recommended the game. It won Outstanding Story-Rich Game at The Steam Awards 2025.

The game was released episodically from October to November 2025 on PC and PS5, with Nintendo Switch ports following in January 2026. A controversial censorship issue arose on Nintendo platforms where mature content was covered with black boxes that could not be disabled, though a February 2026 update partially addressed this for the Switch 2 version.
legacy_and_impact: Considered one of the best spiritual successors to Telltale Games after their closure
Won Outstanding Story-Rich Game at The Steam Awards 2025
Sold over 3 million copies within two months of release completion
Successfully blended narrative adventure with strategic management gameplay
Featured unprecedented collaboration between voice actors and content creators
Sparked important discussions about platform censorship policies
